fields.title: sandbox: unify allowlist helpers
fields.description:
Current duplication:
- Parsing in `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/index.ts` (`parseAllowlist`).
- Normalization/intersection in `extensions/tau/src/task/sandbox-policy.ts`.

Goal:
- Create a single allowlist helper module reused by both.

DoD:
- One implementation for parse+normalize+intersection.
- Existing tests still pass; add/update tests only if needed.
fields.close_reason: Done: created shared/allowlist.ts and unified allowlist helpers across sandbox/index.ts and task/sandbox-policy.ts.
